parameters.name: DatabaseName
parameters.label: Database
parameters.description: Name of the ADX database containing the flowlogs table

parameters.name: SrcIP
parameters.label: Source IP

parameters.name: DstIP
parameters.label: Destination IP

parameters.name: DstPort
parameters.label: Destination Port

content.title: Total Flows
Total Bytes
Unique IPs

content.query:
{"version": "AzureDataExplorerQuery/1.0", "queryText": "flowlogs
| where FlowTime {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SrcIP}) or SrcIP in ({SrcIP})
| where '*' in ({DstIP}) or DstIP in ({DstIP})
| where '*' in ({DstPort}) or tostring(DstPort) in ({DstPort})
| summarize TotalBytes=sum(BytesSrcToDst + BytesDstToSrc), Flows=count() by bin(FlowTime, 5m)
| order by FlowTime asc", "clusterName": "{ClusterName}", "databaseName": "{DatabaseName}"}
content.title: Traffic Over Time

content.query:
{"version": "AzureDataExplorerQuery/1.0", "queryText": "flowlogs
| where FlowTime {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SrcIP}) or SrcIP in ({SrcIP})
| where '*' in ({DstIP}) or DstIP in ({DstIP})
| where '*' in ({DstPort}) or tostring(DstPort) in ({DstPort})
| summarize BytesSent=sum(BytesSrcToDst), BytesRecv=sum(BytesDstToSrc), Flows=count() by SrcIP
| extend TotalBytes=BytesSent + BytesRecv
| top 10 by TotalBytes desc", "clusterName": "{ClusterName}", "databaseName": "{DatabaseName}"}
content.title: Top 10 Sources by Traffic

content.query:
{"version": "AzureDataExplorerQuery/1.0", "queryText": "flowlogs
| where FlowTime {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SrcIP}) or SrcIP in ({SrcIP})
| where '*' in ({DstIP}) or DstIP in ({DstIP})
| where '*' in ({DstPort}) or tostring(DstPort) in ({DstPort})
| summarize BytesSent=sum(BytesSrcToDst), BytesRecv=sum(BytesDstToSrc), Flows=count() by DstIP, DstPort
| extend TotalBytes=BytesSent + BytesRecv
| top 10 by TotalBytes desc", "clusterName": "{ClusterName}", "databaseName": "{DatabaseName}"}
content.title: Top 10 Destinations by Traffic

content.query:
{"version": "AzureDataExplorerQuery/1.0", "queryText": "flowlogs
| where FlowTime {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SrcIP}) or SrcIP in ({SrcIP})
| where '*' in ({DstIP}) or DstIP in ({DstIP})
| where '*' in ({DstPort}) or tostring(DstPort) in ({DstPort})
| summarize Flows=count() by Protocol, Direction, State
| order by Flows desc", "clusterName": "{ClusterName}", "databaseName": "{DatabaseName}"}
content.title: Flow Breakdown

content.query:
{"version": "AzureDataExplorerQuery/1.0", "queryText": "flowlogs
| where FlowTime {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SrcIP}) or SrcIP in ({SrcIP})
| where '*' in ({DstIP}) or DstIP in ({DstIP})
| where '*' in ({DstPort}) or tostring(DstPort) in ({DstPort})
| where State == 'Begin' and BytesSrcToDst == 0 and BytesDstToSrc == 0
| summarize Flows=count() by SrcIP, DstIP, DstPort, Protocol, RuleName
| top 20 by Flows desc", "clusterName": "{ClusterName}", "databaseName": "{DatabaseName}"}
content.title: Top Blocked Flows (Begin with 0 bytes)

content.query:
{"version": "AzureDataExplorerQuery/1.0", "queryText": "flowlogs
| where FlowTime {TimeRange}
| where '*' in ({SrcIP}) or SrcIP in ({SrcIP})
| where '*' in ({DstIP}) or DstIP in ({DstIP})
| where '*' in ({DstPort}) or tostring(DstPort) in ({DstPort})
| project FlowTime, SrcIP, DstIP, SrcPort, DstPort, Protocol, Direction, State, BytesSrcToDst, BytesDstToSrc, RuleName
| order by FlowTime desc
| take 200", "clusterName": "{ClusterName}", "databaseName": "{DatabaseName}"}
content.title: Recent Flows
